column3: you wake up in your house in Twinleaf Town. your mom relays a message from your rival asking you to join him in Snowpoint City to travel to the Battle Zone
you can talk to the sailor in front of the Icebreaker docked in Snowpoint City to get to the Battle Zone. your rival will wait for you there
You can say no before having this fight to better prepare
His team is on the right side of the double battle
His team is on the left side of the double battle
Your partner in the double battle
Your partner in the double battle
Your partner in the double battle

after winning this fight Buck will talk to you about the Island's unofficial Gym challenge. there are six routes on the island and one gym trainer on each route. they will be signaled with the blue color of the official gym leaders in this documentation. fight them all to battle Buck at Stark Mountain
from there you can explore the routes of the island in any order you want

this documentation will go through all the routes in numerical order. the order of the trainers will follow the path one would take if going through the routes in the mentionned numerical order. refer to the trainer's position and orientation to be sure of which you're about to fight
Can be fought alone or in a double battle with PKMN Ranger Ashlee
If fought in a double battle her team will be on the left
Can be fought alone or in a double battle with PKMN Ranger Ashlee [554] or in a double battle with Psychic Daisy [585]
If fought in a double battle her team will be on the right
Can be fought alone or in a double battle with PKMN Ranger Ashlee [554]
If fought in a double battle her team will be on the left
you'll have to fight either Bird Keeper Audrey [554] or Psychic Daisy [585] to continue. either one gives you access to the rest of the route
Once beaten she gives you the Wind Badge
(RUNS BACK AND FORTH IN AN INVERTED L SHAPE)
(WALKS LEFT LOOKS UP AND DOWN THEN WALKS RIGHT AND LOOKS UP AND DOWN WITH A PAUSE TO LOOK UP AND DOWN IN THE MIDDLE) (god)
she's hidden behind some trees, stick to the top tile of the path
Standing at the top of Rock Climb steps
There is a Dawn Stone behind him
Can be fought alone or with Bird Keeper Geneva [555] in a double battle
If fought in a double battle his team will be on the left
Can be fought alone or with Dragon Tamer Stanley [560] in a double battle
If fought in a double battle her team will be on the right
Once beaten he gives you the Fang Badge
There is a Heart Scale left of him

you won't be able to continue on the route much after Black Belt Griffin [588]. Buck will stop you since you haven't beaten the Island's unofficial Gym challenge yet. This documentation will circle back to him in due time
Jump over the ledge and take the Rock Climb steps down to reach her
Once beaten she gives you the Acid Badge
Jump over the ledge and take the suspended bike rope to reach her
There is a Protector below him

you can either continue from the south (with a ground level path) and walk near Black Belt Davon [587] , fight Ace Trainer Moira [574] and then fight the PKMN Ranger Krista and Kyler (either in seperate fights or in a double battle) (all detailled below)
Can be fought alone or with PKMN Ranger Kyler [591] in a double battle
If fought in a double battle her team will be on the left
Can be fought alone or with PKMN Ranger Krista [596] in a double battle
If fought in a double battle his team will be on the right
or if you go north and take the bike rope line you'll only walk near Dragon Tamer Keegan [559]
either way you will end up
Once beaten he gives you the Shadow Badge
Standing next to the path to the Resort Area

(SWIMS LEFT, LOOKS AROUND, SWIMS RIGHT, LOOKS AROUND)

the grand resolution of this storyline is upon you. Charon, burried deep into the heart of Stark Mountain is about to conclude his evil plan. good thing Looker, the International Police officer gets in his way at the last minute, arresting Charon and defeating the evil Team Galactic once and for all !

once outside Buck will invite you to the Survival Area where you will now find the private club where all of Sinnoh's finest and strongest hangs out. PKMN Trainers and Gym Leaders you've met on your voyage will rematch you there either in one on one combat or in the most outstanding challenge in the region....
THE TOP TRAINER CAFE BATTLE MARATHON

you can also take on the Pokemon League again. they have set teams this time but they are stronger. (note : if you challenge the Pokemon League before completing the events of Stark Mountain you won't see their new teams and will be facing the same one team out of four possibilities system as before)
SINNOH POKEMON LEAGUE               ELITE FOUR AARON [866]
SINNOH POKEMON LEAGUE               ELITE FOUR BERTHA [867]
SINNOH POKEMON LEAGUE               ELITE FOUR FLINT [868]
SINNOH POKEMON LEAGUE               ELITE FOUR LUCIAN [869]
well done ! you've beaten the Champion's strongest team. congratulations !
if you want one more challenge. someone is waiting in Oreburgh City... (note : you don't have to go through the events of Stark Mountain or face the new Pokemon League to fight him)
He's in a house next to Oreburgh Mine, the one on the right
i guess you're the best trainer in the region now
maybe you're strong enough to do what no one else can... maybe you're strong enough to find and capture god ...
if you search the region you might also meet the creator. not god. a different kind of creator. somewhere.
but that will be all for me. it was a pleasure to go on this journey with you. goodbye.
